title: epiginomai #1920
definition:
1) to become or happen afterwards
    1a) to be born after
 2) to come to, arrive: of time
 3) to arise, spring up, come on
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to become or happen afterwards
    1a) to be born after
 2) to come to, arrive: of time
 3) to arise, spring up, come on

    NASB:  to come on, arrive:
